message:
style: apply linter formatting to security scanner, lockfile, and trust tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-23ko","title":"Epic: Comprehensive Test Suite — unit tests (no mocks) + real E2E integration tests","description":"Audit all existing unit tests for mock/fake usage. Fill gaps with real-behavior unit tests. Create true E2E integration tests that hit live provider APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, OpenRouter, xAI, DeepSeek) using keys from ~/.pi/agent/models.json. All tests must have detailed logging. Minimize API costs by using short prompts.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:10:48.437154017Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T20:58:45.406875361Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T20:58:45.406852940Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-18j1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:13.817441464Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-1la6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:12.274732222Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-1uch","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:16.601468776Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-1vfi","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:12.591996250Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-277x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:15.974004629Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-2q00","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:15.661077650Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-2r3s","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:11.238635882Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-3ane","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:15.364408637Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-3c0e","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:14.118056558Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-3kgb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:15.041288840Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-3l83","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:12.893839963Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-3r75","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:11.968765198Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-lbtm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:11.591024582Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-ogdk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:16.305286510Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-ovmd","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:13.188485657Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-vg3u","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:14.718006782Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23ko","depends_on_id":"bd-yqfx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:13.501649908Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":539,"issue_id":"bd-23ko","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Coverage audit summary: last successful llvm-cov snapshot reported Lines=75.50%, Functions=73.62%, Regions=74.28% (not full). Current e2e suites contain substantial VCR/playback paths, so live network coverage is incomplete. Local configured providers discovered from ~/.pi/agent/models.json: anthropic, openai, google, openrouter, xai, deepseek. Epic completion criteria: strict no-mock unit suite + live E2E smoke for each configured provider with short prompts, JSONL telemetry, redaction, and deterministic per-provider pass/fail summary.","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:22:42Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-23sa8","title":"[SEC-1.4] Define security SLOs, risk budgets, and release gates","description":"## Background
Security hardening must be governed by measurable release criteria, not subjective confidence.

## Scope
- Define SLOs: false-positive budget, false-negative tolerance for priority attack classes, max detection latency, max runtime overhead.
- Define release gates for CI and staged rollout promotions.
- Define incident-triggered rollback thresholds.

## Deliverables
- `docs/security/security-slos.md`
- CI gate matrix mapping SLOs to test suites.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SLOs are numeric and testable.
- [ ] Rollout phases have explicit promotion/abort criteria.
- [ ] Release decisions can be justified from artifacts.","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] Scope in description is implemented fully with no feature loss
[ ] Unit tests added/updated for success, failure, edge cases, and determinism where applicable
[ ] E2E scripts added/updated for benign flow, adversarial flow, and rollback/recovery flow relevant to this bead
[ ] E2E runs emit structured JSONL logs with: timestamp, issue_id, extension_id, capability, policy_profile, score, reason_codes, action, latency_ms, correlation_id, and redaction_summary
[ ] Artifact manifest is deterministic and linked in bead comments (paths + checksums/identifiers)
[ ] Quality gates pass: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test (plus targeted conformance/security suites)
[ ] If runtime behavior changed, docs/config examples are updated; if no behavior changed, explicitly record N/A rationale for e2e changes","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:39:38.842299957Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T05:33:55.560192065Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["governance","security","slo"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-23sa8","depends_on_id":"bd-2ezm9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:39:55.215385658Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23sa8","depends_on_id":"bd-2nr0q","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:39:55.442456943Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":1353,"issue_id":"bd-23sa8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Claude Opus agent claiming bd-23sa8. Will produce docs/security/security-slos.md with numeric SLOs grounded in baseline-audit.md gaps (G-1 through G-7) and threat-model.md threats (T1-T8). Deliverables: SLOs with false-positive/negative budgets, CI gate matrix, rollback thresholds.","created_at":"2026-02-14T05:33:55Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-23vv","title":"Publish rich_rust crate (crates.io readiness + workflow)","description":"# Scope
Repo: `../rich_rust`
Crate: `rich_rust`

# Steps
- Verify metadata: `Cargo.toml` has license/repo/readme/docs fields.
- Run:
  - `cargo package`
  - `cargo publish --dry-run`
- Add/verify tag-triggered GitHub Actions publish job.

# Acceptance
- `cargo publish --dry-run` succeeds.
- Tag-triggered release workflow exists.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:28:10.628570864Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T00:48:56.066924724Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T00:48:56.066851187Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["crates","rich_rust"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-23vv","depends_on_id":"bd-cccv","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:28:10.646673283Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":454,"issue_id":"bd-23vv","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed rich_rust publish-readiness validation in `../rich_rust`.

Evidence
- Metadata present in `Cargo.toml`: license, repository, homepage, documentation, readme, keywords, categories.
- Workflow check: `.github/workflows/release.yml` is tag-triggered (`v*`), verifies version-tag match, and has token-gated `publish-crates` job using `CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN`.
- Local packaging/publish validation:
  - `cd /data/projects/rich_rust && cargo package --locked` ✅
  - `cd /data/projects/rich_rust && cargo publish --dry-run --locked` ✅

Dry-run succeeded; existing-version crates.io warning is expected/non-blocking.","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:48:16Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-24697","title":"[SEC-WS2] Supply-Chain Trust and Extension Provenance","description":"## Purpose
Reduce risk from malicious or tampered extension code before runtime execution.

## Why This Stream Exists
Runtime controls are necessary but insufficient. Install/update path compromise can bypass user intent and import hostile behavior.

## Deliverables
- Capability-rich extension manifest schema
- Deterministic lockfile and provenance verification
- Install-time static risk scanner and evidence ledger
- Quarantine-to-trust promotion workflow

## Exit Criteria
- [ ] Extension provenance and integrity are auditable and reproducible.
- [ ] Unknown/high-risk extensions do not auto-enter trusted execution.","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] All child beads are complete with linked unit-test evidence, e2e scenario evidence, and structured logging artifacts
[ ] `br dep cycles --json` returns zero cycles for this subtree
[ ] `bv --robot-triage` / `bv --robot-plan` reviewed and dependency bottlenecks addressed before closure
[ ] Security behavior changes are reflected in operator/user documentation and rollout guidance","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:39:36.753033091Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T05:04:09.718212227Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["extensions","security","supply-chain"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24697","depends_on_id":"bd-21nj4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:39:47.654805692Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-24697","depends_on_id":"bd-21vng","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:39:47.428703596Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-24697","depends_on_id":"bd-3br2a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:39:47.202435310Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-24697","depends_on_id":"bd-f0huc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:39:46.954909947Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":1327,"issue_id":"bd-24697","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Supply-chain stream design note:
- Runtime controls cannot compensate for arbitrary code ingest.
- Manifest intent, lockfile reproducibility, and provenance checks are treated as first-class security boundaries.
- Quarantine is the default for uncertain trust, not an optional afterthought.","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:40:07Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-246d","title":"Security suite: budgets (CPU/memory/time) + watchdog","description":"# Goal
Prove extensions cannot exceed resource budgets.

# Scope
- CPU/time: interrupt handler / watchdog terminates runaway code deterministically.
- Memory: allocation caps enforced.
- Hostcall timeouts enforced.

# Acceptance
- Tests assert termination reason + structured metrics.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CobaltRobin","created_at":"2026-02-06T03:15:10.763318520Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T23:49:23.195432174Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T23:49:23.195340593Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-246d","depends_on_id":"bd-193","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T03:15:10.769957823Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

[ ] Docs/fixtures updated if behavior or UX changes","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-03T01:26:23.304039205Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:35:14.758999833Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T01:52:45.712697421Z","close_reason":"Fixed unused import warning and clippy clean in asupersync","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-24f","title":"Unit tests: PackageManager path resolution + filters","description":"Goal:
- Add unit tests for PackageManager path resolution, package identity parsing, and resource filters using real temp dirs, with detailed logging.

Scope:
- parse_source for npm/git/local and identity normalization.
- Installed path resolution for user/project scopes.
- Resource filters: extensions/skills/prompts/themes enable/disable behavior.
- Deterministic resolution ordering and error paths.

Logging Requirements:
- Use TestHarness/TestLogger (bd-3ml) in each test.
- Log parsed source components, resolved paths, and filter decisions.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Tests use real temp dirs and filesystem paths.
- No mocks; no network access.
- Edge cases covered (pinned refs, invalid sources, missing dirs).
- Logs include inputs + resolved outputs for debugging.","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
[ ] Unit tests cover core success/failure + edge cases for this bead (add regression coverage if applicable)
[ ] Integration/E2E script exercises the end-to-end path (or explicitly marks N/A with rationale in notes) and emits detailed JSONL logs + artifacts per bd-4u9
[ ] Logs include inputs, outputs, timing, and redaction summary; artifacts list is deterministic
[ ] Any new fixtures/golden outputs are deterministic and documented
[ ] Quality gates pass: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test
[ ] Docs/fixtures updated if behavior or UX changes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-03T04:58:46.313157289Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:25:35.498438061Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T09:16:34.774969117Z","close_reason":"Added deterministic PackageManager tests (identity/installed_path/filters) + ResolveRoots injection","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24f","depends_on_id":"bd-26s","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-24f","depends_on_id":"bd-3ml","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:03Z","created_by":"import"}]}
